name: Context7
description: Up-to-date code docs and examples for any library, pulled straight into context.
longDescription: Context7 fetches current, version-specific documentation and code examples for thousands of libraries so your agent stops hallucinating outdated APIs. Runs locally via npx; no account required for basic use.
author: Upstash

env.description: Optional API key for higher rate limits (get one at context7.com).
